title: Mwami wanjye, nshaka kuba Uwakijijwe nawe

lines: Mwami wanjye, nshaka kuba Uwakijijwe nawe: Nake kubwawe wenyine Kuk' ur' umucyo wanjye;Mu kwitonda kwanjye numve Urukundo rw'ukuri. No mu mwijima w'ijoro, Nkwibuke, Mwami Yesu.
Mwami wanjye, nshaka kuba Urumuri kubwawe, Ngo njye mmurikir’ ab'isi Baheze mu mwijima.Nakire mu nzira zabo, Bakuri kure cyane. Mbageze ku Mwami Yesu, Ngo na bo bamwizere.
Mwami wanjye nshaka kuba Uvug' Ijambo ryawe, Namamaze, Databuja,Yuko
watubambiwe: Abari mu rupfu rubi, Mbabwir' ikibakiza, Mpumuriz’ abababaye;
